title: Boss Results
description: Defeating a boss sends a clickable chat message that shows performance statistics for every participating player in that boss fight.
body:
![Boss results chat message example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HkmudZfu/images/39fd5dea63cefb0ce237613f87feeaaa0e5c958c.png)

### ! HIGHLY RECOMMENDED FOR PAIRING WITH THE [MINI-BOSS BOSS BARS](https://modrinth.com/mod/mini-boss-boss-bars) MOD !

Upon the defeat of boss entities, from cleaving unthinkable horrors to earning a legendary beast's reverence after a rough scuffle with one, a clickable chat message will appear which upon interaction, will allow one to view their performance (along with others' in the "damage dealt" and "final blow" category—the highest scoring participant in the "damage dealt" category gets an honorific highlight) in that boss fight. This includes vanilla's Elder Guardians (only if they are the ones fought in an ocean monument, where all three count towards the same boss fight).

This mod includes support for modded bosses. The lists below, by their respective game versions, detail which mods and their respective bosses are made compatible with this mod.
